title: ScrollY cross-source spot check on committed video fixture

metricComparisons.description: moving Y position from low to high should still materially reframe decoded media rather than increasing free-form detail
moving ScrollY from low to high should swing rendered decoded-media balance toward the right channel

expectedVideo: the decoded fixture should translate vertically without freezing or edge corruption
the high setting should visibly reframe the committed clip
expectedAudio: fixture audio should follow the same left-to-right balance move as the osc case
the rendered mix should remain stable without level collapse
manualChecks: Does ScrollY remain clear and coupled on decoded media?
Does the higher setting still read as a deliberate AV move rather than a playback artifact?
